name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: Contextual tooltip triggered on hover or focus.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import type { TooltipProviderProps } from 'reka-ui'
import { TooltipProvider as TooltipProviderPrimitive, useForwardProps } from 'reka-ui'

const DEFAULT_DELAY_DURATION = 400

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TooltipProviderProps>(), {
    delayDuration: DEFAULT_DELAY_DURATION,
})

const forwardedProps = useForwardProps(props)
</script>

<template>
    <TooltipProviderPrimitive v-bind="forwardedProps">
        <slot />
    </TooltipProviderPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { TooltipPortal, TooltipContent as TooltipContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { floatingContentSideOffsets } from '@/lib/floating-content-variants'
import { tooltipContentVariants } from '@/components/ui/tooltip/tooltip-variants'

defineOptions({ inheritAttrs: false })

interface TooltipContentProps {
    sideOffset?: number
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<TooltipContentProps>(), {
    sideOffset: floatingContentSideOffsets.tooltip,
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(tooltipContentVariants(), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <TooltipPortal>
        <TooltipContentPrimitive v-bind="$attrs" :side-offset="sideOffset" :class="classes">
            <slot />
        </TooltipContentPrimitive>
    </TooltipPortal>
</template>

export const floatingContentSideOffsets = {
    popover: 8,
    dropdownMenu: 6,
    tooltip: 6,
} as const

export const brutalFloatingSurfaceClasses = [
    'bg-brutal-bg text-brutal-fg border-3 border-brutal shadow-brutal rounded-brutal',
] as const

export const inverseFloatingSurfaceClasses = [
    'bg-brutal-fg text-brutal-bg',
    'border-3 border-brutal rounded-brutal shadow-brutal',
] as const

export const tooltipFloatingAnimationClasses = [
    'animate-in fade-in-0 zoom-in-95',
    'data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95',
    'data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2',
    'data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2',
    'data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2',
    'data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2',
] as const
